title: canarium copaliferum
intro: Canarium copaliferum, also known as the Kanari or Black Dammar tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Canarium copaliferum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Canarium copaliferum essential oil is often used in herbal preparations, such as aromatherapy, topical applications, and infusions, and can be purchased in various forms, including capsules, tinctures, and essential oil blends.
